transcript.clean_text: final day of dopheny 2022 an enormous climbing day of course altitude gained today 3782 meters to be taken on well straight out of the back door to be honest the cold plain ballet there then the last show followed by the sprint on the gron bono the caldera colombia itself the technical downhill to a flat plateau before we finally picked up to solezong to finish the race well it would break a few hearts we had a very large and accomplished breakaway up the road real strength in depth stora bennett elisande amiral dunbar well it started to thin down on the climbs of course and once we've been through the grand borno we were coming to the calder like colombia a majestic pass and jumbo visma were teed up ready to play the game while van out in his green jersey had done a great deal of work and in fact he guided them down the 16 kilometers of descent finally his job was to be done on solo zone itself and in fact the breakaway was starting to lose heart as well kelly ellison was up front after his brave efforts the day prior lawrence de bluss had worked hard for eddie dumbar but it was not to be for india's grenadiers or indeed for group armor francis asher who posted two in the break in the hope that david gardu could do something sensational matteo jorgensen great strength in depth from him during this race david gordo well bitten at the very last i'm afraid he falling out of the top 10 by the finale storer bennett hurts they were up there but so indeed was stephen christ an amazing engine room displayed on the final day in fact he may well have saved a tour de france place for himself and then wenger go attacked once christ spike's job had been done ramps of 8 10 and 14 at the end this was the moment that the dane picked it up on behalf of roglich punching for the line ben o'connor trying to stay with them well they would be the final three on the podium not only on the stage but also for the race itself so who would be allowed to take a step forward at the very last roglich without a stage win in this race but the title guaranteed green jersey for what one out as well surely this had to be for jonas finger goal other great performances esteban chavez really underscoring his potential and greatness of course ahead of the tour de france for ef education easy post the veteran surely part of their plans and what of the plans for yumbo visma well joint leadership apparently for the tour but on this day jonas finger gov takes the stage pretty much glitched the title and welt run out the green jumbo visma had it all ben o'connor well a podium place for him overall as well as the final stage a great statement for ag2r sitcom he will be their principal for the tour who will be the winner of it though that is the question we are waiting could either of these beat tariq bakatya you'll have to wait to find out bingo taking the day same time as primus roglich ben o'connor in third place head of chavez guerrero caruso menkes finished well hague chryswike and tobias johansen who wins the young riders classification roglich takes the title for jumbo visma no stage win for him but vingogo well you'll be delighted by that and likewise the smile on rockledge face says it all better connor finishing third ahead of caruso hague menke's getting up to six chavez finishing seventh for the race terry gegenhart good performance eighth guerrero and tobias hannahsen that white jersey winner right up there pierre along guaranteed the polka dots yesterday but still came out for to assemble yet more points today and the green jersey to what van art quite a collection of what a great race it was for team jumbo visma an amazing race always is and of course we wait to see them all again at the tour de france but who's going to win you
